title: Braised Pork Ragu with Italian Spices
description: A hearty, slow-cooked Italian-inspired dish featuring tender pork in a rich, flavorful ragu. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown pork cubes on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove pork from pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add chopped onion to pot. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in chopped carrots and celery and cook for 2 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Return pork to pot and bring mixture to a simmer.
Cover pot and transfer to preheated oven at 300°F (150°C). Braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until pork is tender.
Remove pot from oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve ragu hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
